overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor town at night. The character moves from narrow covered alleys through a shipyard and town square, eventually reaching a cliff overlook with a view of the ocean and distant fires under a large moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley between stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow covered passage between stone and wooden structures

entered.detail: rough gray stone wall with wooden beams
overhead wooden beam structure providing cover
burning torch in metal frame casting orange light
wooden staircase leading to upper level
large stone arch passage leading to courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered alleyway with stone walls on the left and wooden structures on the right. Torchlight provides warm illumination against the cool night. The path leads toward a distant stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: shipyard courtyard with wooden ship frame

events.description: exits covered wooden walkway into open shipyard courtyard with stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking through stone archway into ship construction area

entered.detail: wooden ship frame with exposed ribs under construction
medieval half-timbered building with dark wooden beams

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered passage through a stone archway into a shipyard courtyard. A wooden ship frame sits to the left while timber-framed buildings appear in the distance. The ground transitions from dirt to cobblestone.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with timber buildings and guards

agents.ego_description: walking through town square passing guards with torches

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor holding a torch near building entrance
civilian pedestrian walking past timber building

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone tower with conical roof in distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a town square with timber-framed buildings on wooden plank walkways. Two guards in red armor stand with torches on the right as the character passes. A round stone tower is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal path along stone fortress walls

agents.ego_description: walking along stone wall path toward the coastal overlook

entered.detail: large pale moon visible in night sky
dark ocean water visible in distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path beside high stone fortress walls. The large moon becomes visible in the sky as the path approaches a cliff edge overlooking the ocean. The stone tower passes by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff overlook with ocean and distant burning village

events.description: character stops at cliff edge to observe the ocean and distant fires

agents.ego_description: standing at cliff edge observing the ocean and distant burning village under the moon

entered.detail: village with multiple fires burning in the distance across the water
rocky cliff face at edge of overlook
flock of birds flying in sky near moon

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a cliff overlook with a panoramic view of the ocean. A village burns in the distance across the water, illuminated by firelight under the large moon. Birds fly overhead as the character stands at the rocky edge observing the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a torchlit alleyway to a vast, moonlit cliffside overlooking a burning coast. It begins within a narrow covered passage of stone and wood, moving toward a distant archway where warm torchlight contrasts with the cool night air. As the camera emerges through the arch, the scene opens into a shipyard courtyard with a wooden ship frame before transitioning onto the cobblestones and wooden walkways of a town square lined with timber-framed buildings and torch-bearing guards. The path then shifts toward a dirt trail beside high fortress walls, passing a round stone tower as the large moon reveals itself in the sky. Finally, the movement culminates at a rocky cliff edge, expanding into a panoramic view of the ocean where a distant village burns under the moonlight while birds fly overhead.
